data.content: Plan revision needed: the proposed fix correctly identifies the redirect-chain root cause, but it reuses redirected_location() without accounting for root-relative Location headers. That helper currently concatenates the Location value onto the full request URL, which would produce an invalid URL for redirects like '/acartine/loom/releases/download/<tag>/...'. Please revise the plan to include correct relative URL resolution for the HEAD probe (for example via URL joining semantics) and tests that cover both a relative release redirect and the extra CDN hop.
